name: CPG hybrid — fitness v5 (gait alternation reward, warm-start from exp004)
changes_from_exp004: Added alternation_bonus: +1.0 each time active foot contact switches from one foot to the other (left->right or right->left), weighted W_ALTERNATION=1.5
Increased W_AIRBORNE: 0.5 -> 1.0 (stronger penalty for simultaneous airborne)
Removed W_VELOCITY (absorbed into speed_bonus — redundant signal)

fitness_function.formula: cumulative_distance*30 + upright*0.2 + speed_bonus*2.0 + alternation_bonus*1.5 + time_alive*0.05 - pitch_rate*0.05 - airborne*1.0 - joint_penalty*0.01 - impact_penalty*0.005 - fall_penalty*200

rationale.hopping_diagnosis: exp004 (2028.1) still hops — airborne penalty only fires when BOTH feet leave the ground. A clever hopper keeps one foot lightly touching while launching, collecting speed_bonus with near-zero airborne penalty.
rationale.alternation_bonus: Detects the foot-contact switch event: when the dominant ground contact switches from right foot to left foot (or vice versa). A symmetric hopper never switches — both feet contact simultaneously. An alternating walker switches ~2 times per full gait cycle (~120 times in 1000 steps at 1.5 m/s). Each switch earns +1.5 pts. Total for walking: ~180 pts; for hopper: 0 pts.
rationale.contact_switch_detection: Track which foot has higher contact force. When that switches (right > left flips to left > right) increment alternation_bonus. This is robust to partial contacts.
rationale.stronger_airborne: W_AIRBORNE 0.5 -> 1.0 closes the loophole further — even brief dual-airborne phases are costly.

result.gait_description: Score regressed from exp004 (2028 → 1064). The alternation bonus may have conflicted with the warm-started hopping gait — the creature couldn't maintain both speed_bonus and alternation simultaneously, so it optimised for alternation at the cost of speed.

diagnosis.problem: Score dropped significantly despite alternation bonus. The alternation reward may be too weak relative to speed_bonus (1.5 vs 2000 pts for sustained speed), or the warm-start from a hopping gait made it hard to transition to walking.
diagnosis.fix_in_next: Try fresh start (sigma=0.5) so CMA-ES is not biased toward the hopping attractor, OR increase W_ALTERNATION substantially, OR reduce W_SPEED_BONUS so walking speed is not required to be as high.
